positive: Minimalist, high-contrast vector illustration of a stylized celestial fox (kitsune) leaping over abstract geometric mountains at sunset. The fox should be composed of flowing, elegant lines and bold silhouettes, depicted in deep sapphire blue and vivid coral orange. The mountains are rendered as clean, sharp, crystalline forms, creating a sense of dynamic movement and symmetry. Composition is centralized, suitable for a chest print on apparel. Style should be a fusion of Japanese Ukiyo-e influence and modern graphic design, with perfect clean edges and strong black outlines. Dramatic backlighting emphasizes the silhouette against a gradient sky. Flat vector art aesthetic, printable quality, perfect symmetry, perfect composition.
negative: blurry, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifact, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, dirty, messy, grainy, low detail, gradient shading, complex shadows, photorealism
